name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: The SHL OPQ32r measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work. Widely used for selection, development and leadership assessment across industries.

name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
description: Measures 18 dimensions of motivation and what energises, drives, and de-motivates individuals at work. Available in 30+ languages.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Measures 96 discrete skills aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Assesses self-reported behaviors across the Great 8 Domains.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Development report for GSA completers. Provides actionable tips on leveraging top skill strengths across the Great 8 Domains.

name: .NET Framework 4.5

name: .NET MVC (New)

name: Agile Software Development

name: AI Skills
